case_title: BOB EVANS FARMS, INC. VS. BABYBACK'S ENTERPRISES INC. et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BOB EVANS FARMS, INC.
